---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability for world-space 2D/2.5D in O3DE
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to build, and where does Diorama (or O3DE) get in the way
today?

## The proposal

What would you like the gem to do? If you have an idea of the component, bus, or
workflow, sketch it.

## Parity note

Diorama keeps every runtime knob reachable both in the Inspector and on a typed
request bus (so humans and scripts/AI drive the same API). If your idea adds a
runtime tunable, note how it would surface both ways.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you have already tried, and why it falls short.
